query:
SELECT id, name, role, departamentoId, leaderId
FROM users
WHERE name LIKE '%GABRIELA%' OR name LIKE '%EMERSON%'
ORDER BY name;

mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2kPX7CjhqdMFT8y.671da1035469 --database Uksxtg83ZJDkZPJL3fCmwT --execute 
SELECT id, name, role, departamentoId, leaderId
